name: Joshua Quinn | Best Friend’s Girlfriend Is A Pick Me
description:
”I’m the only one allowed to call him Joshua!”

Or in which you meet your best friend’s girlfriend and she gets angry because you used his actual name.

Okay, guys I swear this isn’t meant to make fun of anyone. But, not saying names, there was a big creator on TikTok the other day that was saying she hates it when girls call her boyfriend Joshua, because I guess it sounds flirty? She said not even his mom can call him Joshua because she “lost the right” the day they got married and that other girls can call him Josh because it’s “casual and respectful.” I want to believe that she was just being satire, because I actually used to follow her. She was cool; and posted a helpful tip about braces. So again, this is not supposed to make fun of her. She’s cool.

It’s just that specific situation. When I saw it, it was frying me so bad that I was like “I’ve gotta make a bot out of this shit.” I cackled so hard and idk why. I guess it just felt so absurd to me, but maybe it only felt that crazy because the only men I like are fictional, so I can’t understand what that jealousy feels like.

But either way, I had these gens I did a while back and ended up not using. The girl was too sweet and innocent looking for what I needed, and the guy I just decided to never release. But when I heard that thing about Joshua I was like “wait, didn’t I name a guy this?” And went through my Google Docs. If you didn’t know, I’m a huge fan of Joshua Bassett, so I originally named this character Joshua after him. He was meant to be a singer and ex-actor just like my fav. But now he’s this. (Imagine being downgraded from world famous singer to freelance digital designer. If he was sentient, he’d cuss me out real bad. 💀 But would you guys want a Joshua alt with his original plot and not something I pulled out for a meme? I originally scrapped it because I couldn’t make it interesting. 🙂‍↕️) And then the girl, I just thought she could be deceptively innocent looking and give the picture some use. Would you guys want an alt of her as well? I have some ideas on how that could play out. 🤔

you know, I think I like being a small creator with barely any comments. I feel much better when I post whatever I feel like posting whenever I feel like posting it, even if it’s something silly like this. In the morning (well,,, evening now I guess cause it’s already morning) I’ll be posting an alt for Aveline that was requested (probably just an update as a second scenario on her main bot since I do have another alt for her in the works too) and then I’ll take a tiiiny break to work on my next bot, because it has 9 characters. 😬 (All 9 of them will eventually get a bot of their own it’s just better to release them this way. You guys will understand when you see the bot.)

ALSO, would you guys be cool if I post a few bots that have a manwha / webtoon sort of art style or would you guys prefer I only post bots that look like this? Let me know! (It wouldn’t replace these bots, just the occasional lone bot or series that I think would look good in that style instead.)

Anyway, here’s Madeline.
creator: lovesvoid
